title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入图瓦卢：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入圖瓦盧：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Tuvalu Department of Energy and Tuvalu Electricity Corporation requirements, donor-funded ADB / World Bank / EU project technical specifications, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, IEC 63056 second-life battery requirements, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 240/415 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与图瓦卢能源部和图瓦卢电力公司要求、ADB / 世界银行 / 欧盟捐助方资助项目技术规格、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、IEC 63056二次利用电池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及240/415 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與圖瓦盧能源部和圖瓦盧電力公司要求、ADB / 世界銀行 / 歐盟捐助方資助項目技術規格、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、IEC 63056二次利用電池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及240/415 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Department of Energy requirement determination, TEC grid-connection approval, donor-funded project approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Tuvalu Department of Energy requirements, TEC interconnection technical specifications, donor-funded project requirements, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、能源部要求裁定、TEC并网批准、捐助方资助项目批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行图瓦卢能源部要求、TEC并网技术规格、捐助方资助项目要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、能源部要求裁定、TEC併網批准、捐助方資助項目批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行圖瓦盧能源部要求、TEC併網技術規格、捐助方資助項目要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Tuvalu does not yet have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. BESS projects operate under a nascent, project-led regime: Tuvalu Department of Energy policy oversight, Tuvalu Electricity Corporation (TEC) interconnection review, and donor-funded ADB / World Bank / EU technical specifications that reference IEC standards. As a Pacific SIDS atoll nation with solar-plus-storage needs, Tuvalu relies on IEC and project-owner requirements in practice. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Tuvalu are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence required by project specifications — China GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 are not accepted substitutes; (2) IEC 62933 system-level performance and safety requirements referenced in TEC interconnection and donor-funded project approvals; (3) IEC 63056 where refurbished or second-life cells are used; (4) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation compliance where specified for building and installation approvals; (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport documentation mandatory under international dangerous-goods conventions for sea freight via Funafuti; (6) voltage configuration: Tuvalu grid is 240/415 V 50 Hz while China is 220/380 V 50 Hz — nominal voltage differs and PCS must be configured accordingly; and (7) atoll environmental derating for salt-mist, heat, and humidity conditions. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in DoE, TEC, or donor-funded project review.
answer_first.zh: 图瓦卢尚无全面的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。BESS项目在新兴的项目主导制度下运作：图瓦卢能源部负责政策监管，图瓦卢电力公司（TEC）负责并网审查，ADB / 世界银行 / 欧盟等捐助方资助项目技术规格引用IEC标准。作为有太阳能+储能需求的太平洋小岛屿发展中环礁国家，图瓦卢在实践中依赖IEC和项目业主要求。中国BESS出口图瓦卢的实际差距包括：（1）项目规格要求的IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据——中国GB 38031 / GB/T 36276不被接受为替代标准；（2）TEC并网和捐助方资助项目审批中引用的IEC 62933系统级性能和安全要求；（3）使用翻新或二次利用电芯时的IEC 63056要求；（4）建筑和安装审批中如有规定，则需符合NFPA 855消防安全安装要求；（5）通过富纳富提海运所需的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输文件，属国际危险品公约强制要求；（6）电压配置：图瓦卢电网为240/415 V 50 Hz，而中国为220/380 V 50 Hz——标称电压不同，储能变流器须相应配置；（7）针对盐雾、高温和高湿环礁环境的降额处理。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是制造基准，但在能源部、TEC或捐助方资助项目审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 圖瓦盧尚無全面的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。BESS項目在新興的項目主導制度下運作：圖瓦盧能源部負責政策監管，圖瓦盧電力公司（TEC）負責併網審查，ADB / 世界銀行 / 歐盟等捐助方資助項目技術規格引用IEC標準。作為有太陽能+儲能需求的太平洋小島嶼發展中環礁國家，圖瓦盧在實務中依賴IEC和項目業主要求。中國BESS出口圖瓦盧的實際差距包括：（1）項目規格要求的IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據——中國GB 38031 / GB/T 36276不被接受為替代標準；（2）TEC併網和捐助方資助項目審批中引用的IEC 62933系統級性能和安全要求；（3）使用翻新或二次利用電芯時的IEC 63056要求；（4）建築和安裝審批中如有規定，則需符合NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求；（5）通過富納富提海運所需的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸文件，屬國際危險品公約強制要求；（6）電壓配置：圖瓦盧電網為240/415 V 50 Hz，而中國為220/380 V 50 Hz——標稱電壓不同，儲能變流器須相應配置；（7）針對鹽霧、高溫和高濕環礁環境的降額處理。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在能源部、TEC或捐助方資助項目審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
